target_audience: Small-portfolio landlords aged 35-65 in the Denver metro who own 1-10 rental units and are tired of managing tenants themselves while working a full-time job

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Getting 2am calls about leaky faucets and clogged toilets on weekends
pain_points_solutions.solution: 24/7 in-house maintenance dispatch so tenants never call you again

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Property managers who charge for leasing, renewals, inspections, and mystery 'admin fees' that eat your cash flow
pain_points_solutions.solution: Single flat 8% management fee with everything included — no leasing fees, no renewal fees, no upcharges

pain_points_solutions.pain_point: Placing bad tenants who trash the unit and skip out on rent
pain_points_solutions.solution: 7-point tenant screening with eviction, credit, employment, and landlord verification plus a 12-month tenant guarantee

offer: Free rental price analysis and property management audit showing exactly how much more your units should be earning
risk_reversal: If we place a tenant who defaults in the first 12 months, we re-lease the unit for free
guarantees: Flat 8% management fee all-inclusive, 12-month tenant guarantee, 24/7 maintenance response
limited_availability: Only onboarding 10 new doors per month to maintain service quality
discounts: First month of management free when you switch from another company
lead_magnet: The Denver Landlord Rent Report 2026: unit-by-unit market rates by zip code
top_stats: Managing 1,400+ doors across the Denver metro since 2009
Average vacancy time: 14 days versus industry average of 32
97% tenant retention rate at lease renewal
service_area: Denver, Aurora, Lakewood, Centennial, and the greater Denver metro
